case_title: REGLERA, LLC, A COLORADO LIMITED LIABILITY VS. HDC CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 301, ATTY. GREEN APPEARED WITHOUT GIVING NOTICE TO THE OTHER PARTY. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT HDC CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S MOTION TO VACATE SISTER STATE MONEY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DFENDANT HAS SHOWN NO EVIDENCE THAT WOULD SUPPORT DISREGARDING OR MODIFYING THE COLORADO JUDGMENT. NOR HAS DEFENDANT SATISFIED THE SUBSTANTIVE OR PROCEDURAL REQUIREMENTS FOR RELIEF FROM JUDGMENT UNDER CCP 437(B). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: WENDY PUN, CSR # 12891
